title: MapConfig
description: Map identification configuration emitted by apps/tooling and consumed by apps/mobile. Each map name is associated with a perceptual hash computed over a fixed ROI of the minimap region in I-frames. Mobile uses these hashes to identify which EVA map a clip is showing without running OpenCV on device.

reference_resolution.description: Source video resolution the ROI coordinates are calibrated against. ROI is rescaled proportionally for other resolutions.

roi.description: Region of interest within a frame, expressed at reference_resolution. The map name banner sits inside this rectangle.

canvas_size.description: Square canvas size the ROI is normalized into before hashing.

hash_size.description: Hash dimension. hash_size=16 yields 256-bit hashes encoded as 64 hex chars.

hash_method.description: Perceptual hash algorithm used to compute the per-map fingerprint.

text_anchor_width.description: Optional. Width in pixels of the anchor text region inside the ROI used for sub-cropping. Omit if the full ROI is hashed.

maps.description: Map name → hex-encoded perceptual hash string. Map names are lowercased ASCII slugs (e.g. "the_cliff").

additionalProperties.description: Hex-encoded perceptual hash. Length depends on hash_size (e.g. hash_size=16 → 64 hex chars).
